name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste terminal/server logs (redact any keys).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Run mode: [npm dev / Docker / production build]
- Node version: [`node --version`]
- App version / commit: [e.g. 0.0.1 or commit sha]

## Additional context

Which search dimensions were enabled? Which LLM provider? Anything else?
